name: Galaxy Digital Volunteer & Nonprofit Management API
what_it_does: Galaxy Digital REST API for volunteer management and nonprofit community engagement platform. Enables AI agents to manage volunteer profiles and skills matching, handle volunteer opportunity posting and scheduling, track service hours and impact metrics, manage group and corporate volunteer programs, access need and resource mapping for community impact, retrieve reporting and analytics for nonprofits and volunteer centers, integrate with donor management systems, and connect volunteer data with United Way and community impact reporting.
use_cases: Managing volunteer recruitment and opportunity matching from nonprofit coordination agents
Tracking service hours and impact metrics from volunteer analytics agents
Managing corporate volunteer programs from employee engagement agents
Integrating volunteer data with United Way and community impact platforms from reporting agents
not_for: Political campaign volunteer organizing without general nonprofit community focus
Paid workforce management without volunteer-specific engagement workflows
Commercial event staffing without nonprofit volunteer management context
best_when: A nonprofit, volunteer center, United Way, or corporation with volunteer programs using Galaxy Digital wants AI agents to automate volunteer matching, hour tracking, impact reporting, and community engagement workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Volunteer PII including background check results and emergency contacts require careful handling. Corporate volunteer data may include employer information. Automated outreach must comply with CAN-SPAM and TCPA.

auth.notes: Galaxy Digital uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with volunteer, opportunity, and reporting scopes. Developer portal with documentation. Partner program for technology integrations. Webhooks for real-time volunteer events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; nonprofit pricing available
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual pricing based on organization size and features; enterprise pricing for corporations
pricing.notes: Asheville, North Carolina. Founded 2009. Major volunteer management platform. Used by nonprofits, United Ways, volunteer centers, and corporations. Get Connected product is community impact platform. Strong United Way relationships. Competes with Volgistics and Better Impact for volunteer management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Volunteer PII and background check data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with partner program
Corporate volunteer program data may include employer confidential engagement metrics
Automated volunteer outreach must comply with TCPA for text notifications
Impact data aggregation for United Way reporting requires precise hour and outcome tracking
Skills matching automation should respect volunteer availability and preference settings
agent_readiness.security_notes: Volunteer PII and community engagement data. SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Background check data sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Volunteer PII and community data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Background check sensitivity.
